mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_status != 'CANCEL' AND order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT order_no, pay_status FROM pay_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND order_no = #{orderNo} AND pay_status != 'CANCEL' AND username = #{username}
SELECT * FROM pay_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}

SELECT * FROM pay_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_method = 'WX_PAY' AND pay_status = 'PAYING' AND pay_flow_no IS NULL AND pay_time IS NULL AND create_time > DATE_SUB( NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR ) AND create_time < DATE_SUB( NOW(), INTERVAL 2 MINUTE )

SELECT * FROM pay_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND pay_status IN ('NEW', 'PAYING') AND pay_flow_no IS NULL AND pay_time IS NULL AND create_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 2 DAY) AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL #{timeoutMinute} MINUTE)
